description_long: This is a silhouette of an adult human figure with arms extended horizontally, resembling a T-pose. The body appears proportionate, with a broad upper torso, defined head, and legs positioned together. The figure is dressed in typical urban attire, with visible distinctions between the upper and lower garments, and appears to be wearing shoes. The overall build suggests an average adult, with no visible accessories or carried items. The surface is smooth and featureless, indicating a lack of detailed texture or facial features. The posture and proportions are consistent with a standard adult pedestrian commonly seen in city environments.
description: A featureless adult human figure in a T-pose, dressed in typical urban clothing and shoes, with arms outstretched horizontally.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the broad shoulders, outstretched arms, and the head centered between the arms.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the head, chest, and legs, with one arm extended outward.
description_view_2: Bottom-up view emphasizing the soles of the feet, the underside of the arms, and the symmetry of the pose.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the profile of the head, torso, and legs, with the other arm extended outward.
